# Debate Wise

Debate Wise is an open-source AI-assisted debate platform for structured, evidence-based discussions.

Primary language is English. The product supports English and German (EN/DE).

## Canonical Repository

- https://github.com/rockywuest/debate-wise-app

## Core Docs

- README: ./README.md
- Architecture: ./docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- Roadmap: ./docs/ROADMAP.md
- Contributing: ./CONTRIBUTING.md
- Security: ./SECURITY.md
- AI Agent Guide: ./docs/AI_AGENT_GUIDE.md

## Quick Start

1. `npm run bootstrap`
2. `cp .env.example .env`
3. Set `VITE_SUPABASE_URL` and `VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY`
4. `npm run dev`

## Quality Gates

- `npm run check`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run audit:prod`

## Tech Stack

- React + TypeScript + Vite
- Supabase (Postgres, Auth, RLS, Realtime, Edge Functions)
- Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui

## Product Modes

1. Public Commons Mode (shared open instance)
2. Self-Hosted Space Mode (private/curated deployments)

## Keywords

debate platform, AI argument analysis, civic discourse, critical thinking, evidence-based discussion, open-source debate software, bilingual EN/DE
